name: long-running
description: Harness for AI Agents working across context windows — supports multi-session continuity with feature tracking, progress logging, model assignment & review system, Verification Pipeline (7 checks beyond build success), qa-ui-test v2.5 release gates (Gate 1 AC coverage, Gate 2 NFR compliance, Gate 3 bug verification) with /nfr-check + /qa-coverage-check commands and --force-coverage / --force-nfr / --force-bug-verify overrides, incremental development pattern, design doc impact check on /add-feature & /edit-feature, /help command with mode-based guide, and integration with ui-mockup, system-design-doc, qa-ui-test, dotnet-dev skills
